content.en:
The First Divine Lord already knew very well that Ye Tian's speed had indeed reached the level of a first-class supreme, and his own strength was also in the ranks of fourth-rank supremes, if he broke out a special move, he would be able to instantly burst out to a level comparable to the full strength of the third-class supreme.

Now, Ye Tian will just be the master.

Once Ye Tian breaks through, he really has the strength to match him, and he can even surpass him very quickly.

Such a terrible existence, he naturally didn't want to offend.

If he could kill Ye Tian, he might have taken the risk of killing Ye Tian, but now he couldn't kill Ye Tian at all, so why continue to offend Ye Tian.

Moreover, there was no mortal enmity between Ye Tian and the Protoss, and it was completely possible to reconcile.

Moreover, Ye Tian promised to make a move in the future, which was precious.

That's why he agreed to Ye Tian's conditions.

"First Divine Master, sign a contract, otherwise I don't dare to enter the Chaos Ancient Well, otherwise if you arrange the formation here, I may not be able to escape!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, let's sign the contract!"

The first god is the main way.

Soon, Ye Tian signed a contract with the First Divine Master.

The content of the contract includes that the First Divine Lord allows Ye Tian to enter the largest chaotic ancient well to cultivate, and he must not harm or attack Ye Tian in any form, but Ye Tian must also help the Protoss once for free in the case of the future God Lord's difficulties, and in the future, if the Protoss does not provoke the Terrans, the Terrans are not allowed to attack the Protoss at will.

This last one was naturally added by the First Divine Master, in the past, he would not have taken the weak human race in his eyes at all, but now that a genius like Ye Tian has appeared, he will inevitably surpass him in the future.

If he didn't add this article, he was afraid that the human race would grow stronger in the future and would take action against the Protoss, and he would not be able to compete with Ye Tian for the future!

After the contract was successful, Ye Tian followed the First Divine Lord to the largest Chaos Ancient Well, that is, the Divine Lord's Chaos Patio.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, the Chaos Courtyard is located in a Metaverse, that Metaverse was later named the Divine Realm by our Protoss, the Divine Realm is the foundation of our Divine Lord, many Protoss have been stationed there for a long time, unless the Tribal Tribulation is destroyed, those Supremes will not come out. You can follow me into the Divine Realm, but you must not trespass on other places, otherwise even if you and I have an oath, other Protoss Supremes will not care about this. "

The First Divine Lord reminded.

"Understand, I'm just going to enter the Chaos Courtyard to cultivate for a while, and it won't take too long!"

Ye Tiandao.

"That's good!"

The First Divine Lord nodded.

Soon, the First God Lord and Ye Tian came to the Pantheon of the Protoss, this planet was just an ordinary planet before, but since the birth of the God Realm and the Chaos Courtyard, this planet has been changed to Pantheon, and has even been transformed into a giant planet, containing powerful rules, even the Supreme is difficult to destroy the Pantheon at once.

If you want to enter the divine realm, you must enter the Pantheon and enter the divine realm through the entrance of the pantheon.

For this entrance, the Protoss naturally guards it strictly.

But this time, the First Divine Lord personally brought Ye Tian to come, and naturally no one dared to stop him.

Rumble!!!!

The First Divine Lord took Ye Tian through the entrance of the God Realm on the Ten Thousand Gods Star and entered the God Realm of the God Clan.

When the First Divine Lord and Ye Tian appeared together, the phantom of the Supreme appeared.

"I've seen the First Divine Master!"

"I've seen the First Divine Master!"

"I've seen the First Divine Master!"

One by one, the Supreme Beings greeted the First Divine Lord, but their eyes stared at Ye Tian one by one, as if they had locked on to Ye Tian.

"I brought the Master of the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race, and he wants to enter the Chaos Courtyard to cultivate for a period of time, and I have already agreed to this matter!"

The first god is the main way.

"Since it was brought by the First Divine Master, you can naturally enter the Chaos Courtyard!"

One by one, the phantoms of the Supreme Beings dispersed.

"Hmph, let's go!"

The First Divine Lord seemed to be a little displeased.

He is also the first god master of the god clan, and he personally brought Ye Tian in, don't you understand what the situation is?

These Supremes are deliberately so!

However, he was also very aware of the duties of these supremes, even the first god lord of the Protoss couldn't mobilize them in normal times, they were the oldest supremes of the Protoss, and they had lived too long and too long.

In terms of identity, he is still a junior, and it is only because of his strength that he became the first god master.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded.

After a few teleportations, Ye Tian and the First Divine Lord came to the Chaos Courtyard.

There are also many formations arranged here, which shows how much importance the Protoss attaches to the Chaos Courtyard.

"This is the Chaos Patio!"

The First Divine Lord pointed to the Chaos Patio and said.

Ye Tian took a look, this chaotic well occupied a radius of hundreds of miles, and the chaotic ancient well that was born in the Earth Metaverse was only a little bigger, that is, only a few meters wide, and the two could not be compared at all.

Moreover, the rules contained in this chaotic patio are very powerful, and non-juggernauts are not allowed to enter, and if they force their way in, they will be forcibly killed by the rules of the chaotic patio.

Under normal circumstances, the powerhouses below the Domination would at most cultivate nearby, and only the powerful Dominants would be allowed to enter the Chaos Courtyard to practice if they had great merit.

"First Divine Master, I've entered the Chaos Patio!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Let's go inside!"

The First Divine Lord nodded.

He didn't know why Ye Tian had to enter the Chaos Courtyard, but this was Ye Tian's secret, and the two were in a trading relationship, so it was naturally inconvenient to ask.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian stepped into the interior of the chaotic patio and suddenly appeared in a chaotic void.

"What a powerful rule!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The rules here are even stronger than the rules of the Origin Realm, and the area here is very large, through the Life Heavenly Pupil, he found that there are many powerhouses of the God Race in this chaotic void who are cultivating in retreat.

The Protoss had turned this place into districts, each with a palace that barely disturbed each other.

Ye Tian's arrival did not attract the attention of any of the Protoss powerhouses, because even if the Protoss Master and Tianzun wanted to come in and cultivate once, it would not be easy for them to waste time observing the situation in the outside world, and would only concentrate on cultivating.

"Gotta find out if this is the place I'm looking for!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he used a secret technique to investigate.

"Chaos Vitality Concentration, that's enough!"

"Chaos Origin Breath ......"

Ye Tian tried his best to find it, but finally let him find the place where a trace of the Chaos Origin Aura was, located in the depths of the Chaos Courtyard, where the rules were even more powerful, and ordinary masters and even supremes didn't want to get close.

Swish!

Ye Tian continued to fly towards the depths below, and the pressure he was under became stronger and stronger.

If the other supremes will definitely not be able to bear it, because their physical bodies are not strong enough, even if they rely on their powerful divine power to enter the depths, they will not be able to cultivate, and they can't always use their divine power to protect their bodies, so how can they cultivate?

But Ye Tian's physical body was so terrifying, he was not afraid of this kind of pressure at all, and flew all the way to the depths of the chaotic void in the Chaos Courtyard.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian stood on top of a sea.

This is not the real sea, but the sea that is transformed into the extremely rich Chaos Origin Aura, and there are some weaker Chaos Origin Aura here, which is the Chaos Origin Aura treasure land in his ideal, which is enough for him to condense a half-step Chaos Life Body.

"Although there is a big gap with the best treasure land in Chaos, I only need to condense a half-step Chaos Life Body, and this is enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately.

Ye Tian simply arranged the means, and took out a palace treasure and turned it into his own cultivation place.

Next, he needs to retreat and practice here, impact the Heavenly Venerable realm, and at the same time condense the half-step chaotic life body, once he succeeds, his strength will reach an incredible level, and it is very likely that he will even surpass the first god master in one fell swoop.
